description:
Testing-review M3. config.ex (struct with @enforce_keys) is exercised only transitively via cli_test — no test pins defaults or the enforce-keys contract. telemetry.ex emits run.start/stop, coverage.stop, baseline.stop, enumeration.stop, site.start/stop, but only site.start/stop is verified (indirectly, in mutation_runner_parallel_test). A consumer attaching handlers (documented contract mutagen.mutation_pipeline.r15) could break silently on a renamed measurement key.

Fix: telemetry_test.exs attaching a handler and asserting each event's {measurements, metadata} key set across a minimal pipeline run; small config_test.exs pinning defaults + enforce-keys.

Done: every documented telemetry event's shape asserted; config defaults + enforce-keys pinned.
title: M3: direct tests for config.ex + telemetry.ex
